title: onobrychis arenaria subsp. arenaria
intro: Onobrychis arenaria subsp. arenaria, commonly known as sainfoin, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve gut health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as osteoporosis. Sainfoin is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
